milestoneTitle: Phase M9.17d — No text selection on tappable surfaces. Added user-select:none + -webkit-user-select:none + -webkit-touch-callout:none to every tappable / draggable / clickable class (learn-item-head, learn-action-btn, learn-grab-handle, panel-tile, card, tool-card, stack-card, project-card, continue-row, filter-chip, chips.glass button, dash-action, youtube-open-btn, project-delete, storage-key-delete, pin-picker-remove, pin-btn, save-btn). Fixes iOS long-press popping the selection loupe and accidental drag-highlight behavior that distracted from tap / drag feedback. Informational-only surfaces below heads (summary, meta, coverage, long-form body copy) stay selectable so users can copy text. CLAUDE.md design-language section updated with the rule.
